body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
dependency updates; uses ClimaParams v1 and restricts some package versions for compatibility

Note: The integrated land diagnostics failed with the new ClimaLand release. ClimaLand needs to compute wind speed from `atmos.u` in coupled case (and `p.drivers.u` in prescribed case, which we do now). For now we'll only use the "short" diagnostics list (which excludes wind speed), but we should fix this in ClimaLand and go back to "long" diagnostics with the next release

Closes #1466
Closes #1456
Closes #1450

## Package updates
```
    Updating `~/clima/ClimaCoupler.jl/experiments/ClimaEarth/Project.toml`
  [b2c96348] ↑ ClimaAtmos v0.31.3 ⇒ v0.31.4
  [08f4d4ce] ↑ ClimaLand v0.20.0 ⇒ v0.20.1
  [5c42b081] ↑ ClimaParams v0.12.1 ⇒ v1.0.0
  [e98cc03f] ↑ Insolation v0.10.1 ⇒ v0.10.2
⌅ [9e8cae18] ↑ Oceananigans v0.98.0 ⇒ v0.98.1
  [49b00bb7] ↑ SurfaceFluxes v0.12.2 ⇒ v0.12.3
  [b60c26fb] ↑ Thermodynamics v0.14.0 ⇒ v0.14.1
```


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->
